title: SPTResultProperties
description: SPTResultProperties: Properties related to the results of the standard penetration test.

SeatingDriveBlows.description: Number of blows for seating drive (ISPT_SEAT).

MainTestDriveBlows.description: Number of blows for main test drive (ISPT_MAIN).

SPTN60.description: Number of blows for main test drive, with value corrected by energy ratio (ISPT_N60).

TotalPenetration.description: Total penetration for seating drive and test drive (ISPT_NPEN). Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

SelfWeightPenetration.description: Self weight penetration (ISPT_SWP). Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

SeatBlows1.description: Number of blows for first increment seating (ISPT_INC1).

SeatBlows2.description: Number of blows for second increment seating (ISPT_INC2).

TestBlows1.description: Number of blows for first increment test (ISPT_INC3).

TestBlows2.description: Number of blows for second increment test (ISPT_INC4).

TestBlows3.description: Number of blows for third increment test (ISPT_INC5).

TestBlows4.description: Number of blows for fourth increment test (ISPT_INC6).

SeatPenetration1.description: Penetration for 1st Increment Seating (ISPT_PEN1). Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

SeatPenetration2.description: Penetration for 2nd Increment Seating (ISPT_INC2). Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

PenetrationTest1.description: Penetration for 1st Increment Test (ISPT_PEN3). Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

PenetrationTest2.description: Penetration for 2nd Increment Test (ISPT_PEN4). Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

PenetrationTest3.description: Penetration for 3rd Increment Test (ISPT_PEN5). Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

PenetrationTest4.description: Penetration for 4th Increment Test (ISPT_PEN6). Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
